[USER_1]@[HOST_1]> show configuration | display set | no-more

## Last changed: sanitized lab output
## Prompt, blank lines, inactive statements, and apply-groups are intentionally present.

  set    system   host-name   [HOST_1]
set system apply-groups [GROUP_1]
set groups [GROUP_1] system services ssh root-login deny
set system services ssh protocol-version v2
inactive: set system services telnet
set system login user [USER_1] class read-only
set system login user [USER_1] authentication encrypted-password "[SECRET_1]"
set system root-authentication encrypted-password "[SECRET_1]"
set system login idle-timeout 10
set system login message "[BANNER_1]"
set system syslog host [IP_1] any notice
set system syslog time-format year
set system ntp server [IP_2]
set system internet-options no-source-route
set system no-redirects

set snmp community [COMMUNITY_1] authorization read-only
set snmp community [COMMUNITY_1] clients [IP_3]/32

set firewall family inet filter [FILTER_1] term allow-mgmt from source-prefix-list [PREFIX_LIST_1]
set firewall family inet filter [FILTER_1] term allow-mgmt then accept
set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet filter input [FILTER_1]

deactivate system services web-management http
[USER_1]@[HOST_1]>
